name: metagraphed-contract
description: Generated OpenAPI contract types for the metagraph.sh API. Auto-generated by openapi-typescript from public/metagraph/openapi.json (see scripts/generate-types.ts at the repo root) -- do not hand-edit. Regenerate via `npm run types:generate` at the repo root. Internal-only workspace package, never published; packages/client depends on it as a devDependency and bundles/inlines its types into the published SDK's own dist/index.d.ts.
